01-basic-popover.title: Basic
01-basic-popover.description: Default popover with a short note and two clear actions.

02-toggleable-options.title: Toggleable Options
02-toggleable-options.description: Popover containing a list of toggleable options using List.Item and List.Switch.

03-table-row-actions.title: Table Row Actions
03-table-row-actions.description: Per-row action menu in a data table, anchored to the overflow button.

04-input-form.title: Input Form
04-input-form.description: Popover containing a small form with labeled input fields and save/cancel actions.

05-arrow-positions.title: Arrow & Positions
05-arrow-positions.description: Directional arrow enabled across all four placement options.
